def negative_repeated_small_writes_without_buffering_or_join():
    rule_id = "repeated_small_writes_without_buffering_or_join"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag code that emits many tiny writes instead of buffering."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
